name: Lacework
description: Monitor Lacework cloud security platform for threat detection and compliance posture

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Lacework at https://YOUR_ACCOUNT.lacework.net
2. Go to Settings → API Keys → Create New API Key
3. Download the JSON with keyId and secret
4. Generate an access token: POST /api/v2/access/tokens with keyId and secret
5. Enter your account name and access token below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Access Token generated via Lacework API. Use your keyId and secret to get a token from POST /api/v2/access/tokens

credentialFields.label: Account Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your Lacework account subdomain (e.g. mycompany from mycompany.lacework.net)

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Lacework is actively monitoring cloud environments for threats

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Lacework users with access to cloud security data
